scores.correctness_notes: Fully correct and comprehensive: covers all notice types (custom, change-update, warning), identity/deduplication by (user ID, type, key), persistence across restarts, the pebble_custom_notice event, and additional accurate details (LazyNotice, repeat_after, Container methods).
scores.hallucination_notes: none — extra details like LazyNotice, ops.pebble.NoticeType enum, Container.get_notices(), PebbleCustomNoticeEvent are all real ops APIs and do not appear fabricated
